chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1301 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.5502/2023 3. For hearing of main case 03-10-2023 Mr. Muhammad Saleh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Riaz Ahmed Buriro, Advocate for Respondent No.7 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General ASI Riaz Ali Korai, I.O of Crime No.153/2023 PS Pano Akil.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Muhammad Saleh Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioners which is taken on record. Mr. Riaz Ahmed Buriro Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.7, which is also taken on record. Respondent No.6/I.O of Crime No.152/2023, registered at P.S, Pano Akil, u/s 457/2, 365-B, 34 PPC, is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Mehmooda (petitioner No.1) recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Yasir Ali (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and free will and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She further stated that her father (respondent No.7) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Learned counsel being satisfied with the statement of I.O does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed.

Learned counsel being satisfied with the statement of I.O does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
